description: ARIS Continental Overview — Key metrics across all AU Member States

targets.rawSql:
SELECT c.code AS country, COUNT(he.id) AS active_events
FROM animal_health.health_events he
JOIN governance.countries c ON c.tenant_id = he.tenant_id
WHERE he.status IN ('suspected', 'confirmed')
  AND ($country = 'ALL' OR c.code = $country)
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM he.created_at) = $year
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR he.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY c.code
ORDER BY active_events DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN v.status = 'completed' THEN 100.0 ELSE 0 END), 1) AS coverage
FROM animal_health.vaccinations v
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM v.created_at) = $year
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR v.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}));

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', cs.submitted_at) AS time,
       COUNT(*) AS submissions
FROM collecte.submissions cs
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM cs.submitted_at) = $year
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR cs.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT wi.status, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM workflow.workflow_instances wi
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM wi.created_at) = $year
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR wi.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY wi.status
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT he.disease_name AS disease,
       COUNT(*) AS events,
       SUM(he.cases) AS total_cases,
       SUM(he.deaths) AS total_deaths
FROM animal_health.health_events he
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM he.created_at) = $year
  AND ($country = 'ALL' OR he.country_code = $country)
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR he.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY he.disease_name
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_operational = true) AS operational,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_operational = false) AS pending,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM governance.countries
WHERE is_active = true;

list.name: tenant_id
list.label: Tenant
list.description: Tenant ID filter injected by ARIS proxy

list.name: country
list.query: SELECT 'ALL' AS __value, 'All Countries' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT code AS __value, code AS __text FROM governance.countries WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY 2;

title: ARIS Continental Overview
